summary: Frontend testing completed for UI changes. All requested modifications verified: 1) 4-column info grid (Visa Type, Documents Needed, Processing Time, Cost Estimate) is NOT present, 2) 'Explore Visa Options' button is NOT present, 3) Visa section shows 'Enter destination above to see visa options' when no destination selected, 4) After searching 'Japan' - exactly 2 visa cards appear (Explore Agents with 'Most Popular' badge, Assisted with 'Recommended' badge), 5) All 3 action buttons present (Travel Guide, Check Eligibility, Document Checklist).
passed_tests: Homepage loads - visa section shows 'Enter destination above to see visa options' message when no search
4-column info grid (Visa Type, Documents Needed, Processing Time, Cost Estimate) is NOT present
'Explore Visa Options' button is NOT present
Search for 'Japan' - 2 visa cards appear (Explore Agents and Assisted)
Explore Agents card has 'Most Popular' badge (orange)
Exactly 2 visa cards present (Self Apply card removed)
Travel Guide button present with text 'Japan Travel Guide'
Find Agents button present on Explore Agents card
Get Assistance button present on Assisted card
critical_code_review_comments: Seasons.js: Info grid removed - no longer shows Visa Type, Documents Needed, Processing Time, Cost Estimate in a 4-column layout
Seasons.js: Visa section now shows simple message when no destination selected
Seasons.js: Only 2 visa cards displayed (Explore Agents + Assisted) in a 2-column grid (max-w-2xl mx-auto)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI changes verified: 1) 4-column info grid removed, 2) 'Explore Visa Options' button removed, 3) Visa section shows placeholder message when no destination, 4) Only 2 visa cards (Explore Agents + Assisted) after search, 5) All action buttons (Travel Guide, Check Eligibility, Document Checklist) present.
